name: ACSAC 2026
formatting_rules: Use the IEEE double-column conference format.
Use IEEEtran.cls version 1.8b with the conference,compsoc options for LaTeX submissions.
Format the paper for US letter, not A4.
Do not modify margins, line spacing, or font size.
Do not include author names or affiliations in the submission PDF.
Refer to prior work in the third person to preserve dual-anonymous review.
References and appendices must be well marked.
Program committee members are not required to read appendices.
review_warnings: Too-short submissions may be desk rejected.
Submissions that do not match conference topics risk desk rejection.
